creator: cstdenis@ctgameinfo.com
text:
Missing dependancies (php modules). It also needs the following modules: ctype, pdo_mysql (and therefore pdo), xml, simple_xml


[03-May-2017 20:53:16 America/Vancouver] PHP Fatal error:  Call to undefined function ctype_alpha() in /usr/local/www/orangehrm/symfony/lib/vendor/symfony/lib/config/sfConfigCache.class.php on line 225
[03-May-2017 20:54:20 America/Vancouver] Couldn't locate driver named mysql
[03-May-2017 21:02:46 America/Vancouver] PHP Fatal error:  Call to undefined function simplexml_load_file() in /usr/local/www/orangehrm/symfony/lib/vendor/symfony/lib/i18n/sfMessageSource_XLIFF.class.php on line 54
[03-May-2017 21:11:58 America/Vancouver] PHP Fatal error:  Call to undefined function utf8_decode() in /usr/local/www/orangehrm/symfony/lib/vendor/symfony/lib/plugins/sfDoctrinePlugin/lib/vendor/doctrine/Doctrine/Validator.php on line 13
